name: Inlaid Cat's Eye Agate Copper Ring
Stonehead Arrow
description: An arrow for use with a bow.

name: Worn Fine Wood Bow
foundAt: Dropped by a risen thaumaturgist (Shaded Dunes, outside the Ancient Crypt)

name: Corroded Bronze Shortsword
foundAt: Dropped by a risen thaumaturgist (Shaded Dunes, outside the Ancient Crypt)

name: Torch
description: A simple torch.

name: Third Degree Fourfold Sash
description: An ornate sash affixed with three emblems.

name: Stained Black Iron Dagger
description: A vile black iron dagger stained and crusted with the blood of its victims.

name: Worn Circle Tunic
description: A dusty old tunic given by the Circle of Scarce Rains.

name: The Measure Stick
effect: Sense Magic (On Click. Any Slot. Cast Time: 5s. Level: 15)
description: A worn yellow stick with uniformly spaced line markings, identical in length.

name: Mining Pouch
description: A pouch specifically designed for storing stone, ore, and gems.

name: Green Drakeling Scale Cloak
description: A cloak fashioned from the hide and scales of green drakelings.

name: Platinum Badge of the Living City
description: A shimmering badge imprinted with the likeness of Yusail Hakim.

name: Well-Worn Cloth Shirt
description: The shirt you arrived in.

name: Waterskin
description: This is a modest drink.

name: Water Flask
description: This is a modest drink.

name: Ration
description: This is a modest meal.

name: Bread Rolls
description: This is a modest meal.

name: Longbow
description: A ranged weapon used to shoot arrows.

name: Scapular Acolyte Hood of Ashes
description: A scorched hood of layered cloth and ash-stained prayer cords, once worn by those who served flame without question.

name: Smuggler's Damaged Logbook
description: A logbook of the smuggler's activities with several pages missing.
foundAt: Dropped by Toma the Two-Faced (Shaded Dunes)

name: Antique Billon Coin
description: A centuries-old coin minted in billon.

name: Bonecarver's Shank
description: A rough shank knife, worn from carving through bone day after day.

name: Moonwhisper Knot
foundAt: Dropped by a shimmering shadow (Shaded Dunes)

name: Shattered Staff of Allistaire
effect: Blaze (On Click. Must Equip. Cast Time: 10s. Level: 40)

name: Copper Throwing Dagger
description: A dagger used for throwing.

name: Copper Fasteners
description: Copper fasteners used in tailoring.

name: Copper Stirrups
description: Copper stirrups used for saddles.

name: Copper Tread
description: Copper tread used for stirrups.

name: Copper Cauldron
effect: Place Copper Cauldron (On Click. Any Slot. Cast Time: 6s. Level: 1)
description: A cauldron for brewing alchemical concoctions.

name: Brittle Sharpening Stone
effect: Brittle Sharpening Stone +2 STR (On Click. Any Slot. Cast Time: 3s. Level: 1)

name: Brittle Weightstone
effect: Brittle Weightstone +2 STR (On Click. Any Slot. Cast Time: 3s. Level: 1)

name: Medium-Quality Wolf Pelt
description: A wolf pelt of average quality. It can be refined at a tannery.

name: Low-Quality Jackal Pelt
description: A jackal pelt of mediocre quality. It can be refined at a tannery.

name: Lunar Festival Trousers
description: Festival attire worn by the Benu Dhai who revere the aspects of Eth-Ur's moons.

name: Wristguard of Wailing
description: A bracelet torn from the hands of a screaming giant.

name: Surgeon's Razor
description: A cutter's knife.

name: Windstorm Moccasins
foundAt: Dropped by Hemalmula the Hunter (Vale of Zintar)

name: Thornbark Mantle
description: A sturdy mantle made out of a large treant's bark and branches.

name: Inlaid Cat's Eye Agate Bronze Earring
Infernal Helm
description: An impressive helm tinted by the flames of the Blacktide forge.

name: Festival Facesmasher
description: A weighty hammer stained with the blood of those who required assistance entering the Eternal Hunting Grounds.

name: Rat Tooth
description: A large incisor from an even larger rat. It would have kept growing, if only you kept it in the rat.

name: Raw Bat Meat
description: A stringy piece of meat from a bat.

name: Skeleton Jawbone
description: The broken jawbone of a dusty skeleton.

name: Night Terror's Wing
description: A wing from the giant bat known as Night Terror.

name: Taskmaster's Leathers
description: Scarred and sweat-darkened leathers, bearing the weight of a taskmaster's rule.

name: Scarab Greaves
description: A pair of greaves fashioned from the iridescent carapace of a scarab.

name: Scarab Boots
description: A pair of boots fashioned from the iridescent carapace of a scarab.

name: Scarab Helm
description: A helmet fashioned from the iridescent carapace of a scarab.

name: Filthy Cloth Hood
description: A soiled and foul smelling cloth hood found on Toma the Two-Faced.

name: Ghost Poppy
description: A flower named for its coloring and slightly translucent petals.

name: Lionleaf
description: A resilient herb often found growing near rocks and structures.

name: Ironroot
description: A sturdy herb found growing near cliffsides.

name: Nomad's Grace
description: A herb commonly found along well-traveled paths, a welcome sight to those who are lost.

name: Whispering Sage
description: A herb with rustling fronds that sound like hushed whispers.

name: Ghost Poppy Powder
description: A fine powder made from ghost poppies.

name: Lionleaf Powder
description: A fine powder made from lionleaf.

name: Ironroot Powder
description: A fine powder made from ironroot.

name: Nomad's Grace Powder
description: A fine powder made from nomad's grace.

name: Whispering Sage Powder
description: A fine powder made from whispering sage.

name: Obscure Broadsword
description: A dark, ominous-looking broadsword.

name: Blacktide Wristguard
description: A heavy, spiked orcish wristguard worn by members of the Clan Blacktide. It is too impractical to be worn on both wrists.

name: Krindor's Hunting Bow
description: A crude orcish bow, reeking of rot.

name: Mushroom
description: This is a light snack.

name: Lemon
description: This is a light snack. A yellow citrus fruit with a sour-sweet flavor.

name: Tomato
description: This is a generous snack. The bright red fruit of a tomato plant. It has a sweet-sour flavor.

name: Mother's Sorrow
description: A well-worn yet beautifully maintained mace. It emanates both power and sadness.

name: Dragon Sinew Bow
description: A prized bow of the Wyrmsbane, strung with wyrmgut.

name: Moonrise Staff
description: A gnarled wooden staff adorned with raven feathers and a large cloudy pearl.
foundAt: Dropped by Onis the Elder (Vale of Zintar)

name: Ashira Warrior Necklace
description: A beautiful yet simple necklace from an ashira warrior.

name: Ashira Scout Necklace
description: A delicate handcrafted necklace from an ashira scout.

name: Ashira Tail
description: A severed ashira tail.

name: Bell Pepper
description: This is a light snack.

name: Worn Bow
description: A ranged weapon used to shoot arrows.

name: Multhele Root
description: A brown fibrous root. It feels damp to the touch.

name: Potato
description: This is a light snack.

name: Note from Ariblast
description: A note from Ariblast to his disgraced group.
readText:
Once you've got your hands on the urn, bring it to me immediately in the Tomb of the Last Wyrmsbane.

The ritual cannot wait any longer!

- Ariblast

name: Aashir's Journal Page 42
description: A page torn from Aashir's journal.
readText:
Whatever they encountered swiftly dispatched an entire company of what, based on the weapons and armor already found, appear to be quite capable combatants.

We are still working to establish the rough timeframe or era of the incident, but it seems to be more recent than the artifacts discovered at the recently uncovered city site.

It has been fascinating trying to piece together what transpired. Perhaps it was a group that was aware of the site we have recently uncovered?

Either way, it is impossible to tell if they were coming or going, that is, if that assumption is indeed correct.

name: Scorched Academy Folio
description: An academy folio that has seen better days. The letter V is still legible on the cover.

name: Farwinds Pendant
description: A curio pendant inlaid with a carved opal sparrow.

name: Inlaid Star Rose Quartz Bronze Ring
Glacial Fists
description: Fists made out of a polar bear's paws. They are both cold and brutal.

name: Tarnished Tinker's Ring
description: A delicate ring, humming faintly with the echo of Merrisam's once-great inventions and bravery.

name: Saltworn Sabatons
description: Sabatons scuffed from long use on shore and stone.

name: Wererat Pelt
description: The pelt of an animal... or a very furry human.

name: Severed Ring Finger
description: A severed finger wearing a ruby-inset gold ring.

name: Vibroplasmic Residue
description: An oily fruity-smelling residue scraped from a zombie's skin.

name: Crystallized Shard
description: A shard of crystallized spectral essence from Timmon Bell.
foundAt: Dropped by several named/boss monsters, each with its own flavor text naming the source - also confirmed from Jakob Geffrey, High Marshal Fionna, and Gregan Snyde.

name: Emerald Encrusted Ring
description: A golden ring with a socketed emerald.

name: Rigid Sharpening Stone
effect: Rigid Sharpening Stone +11 STR (On Click. Any Slot. Cast Time: 3s. Level: 40)

name: Elemental Core
description: The core of an elemental.

name: Cooked Orc Meat
description: This is a modest meal.

name: Dizzik's Wicked Dagger
description: A dark iron blade with a cannelure that coats the blade in debilitating poison when thrust outward.

name: Great Sword of the Dragon Crusader
Amethystine Serpent Mace
description: A mace veined with patterns reminiscent of a serpent winding through shadows. Its handle is crafted from a deep amethyst crystal.

name: Sand Giant's Napkin
description: An impressively sized napkin that serves as a resilient cloak.

name: Blade of the Witchguard
description: A wicked blade with an unnaturally cold edge. It grows heavier with each soul claimed.

name: Whalebone Spear
description: A massive spear fashioned from a whale's sun-cured jawbone.

name: Steward's Coif
description: A stitched linen cap worn by a steward of one of the noble houses of Upper Saman.

name: Inlaid Star Rose Quartz Steel Earring
Grain Cellar Key
description: A key found in the grain cellar of a farm in Sungreet Strand.

name: Giant Fire Wedding Ring
description: An enormous platinum band inlaid with a unique fire opal, large enough to serve as a plate girdle.

name: Maleq's Toothpick
description: Once used to pry the bones of fallen adventurers from between a giant's maw, this edged blade becomes a formidable weapon in smaller hands.

name: Gore's Stompers
description: Dents, pits, and scratches cover the dark iron of these heavy plate boots.

name: Filth-Covered Slaver's Boots
description: Filthy leather boots that have been imbued with a cruel and cunning magic.

name: The Taskmaster's Leggings
description: These leggings are incredibly durable, despite being covered in filth and blood.

name: Visru's Chain
description: Forged in fervor, this chain mail glows with zealot's fire, imbuing its wearer with unyielding devotion.

name: Orb of the Fading Flame
description: The once-eternal flame now begins to fade...

name: Seal of Blood Magic
description: A necklace bearing a strange dark seal. The inverse side bristles with sharp spikes and is stained dark with blood.

name: Still-Beating Heart
description: The shriveled heart still somehow beats in your hand.

name: Medallion of the Ninth Flame
description: A brilliant medallion hanging from a delicate silver chain. The inscription on it reads: A.'.C.'.9 "Our prayers are the ash upon her altar."

name: Robe of the Undying Scholar
effect: Minor Intelligence (On Click. Any Slot. Cast Time: 5s, Level: 1)

name: Acolyte Mantle of Ashes
description: A layered mantle of char-stiffened cloth, heavy with ash and the faint scent of burnt offerings long past.

name: Acolyte Robe of Ashes
description: A tattered robe steeped in soot and sorrow. Its fabric is singed by ritual flame.

name: Burnt Rune Staff
description: A blackened, wretched staff etched with burnished runes in a forgotten tongue. Faint pulses of magic still cling to it, echoes of life refusing to fade.

name: Wicked Longbow
description: A wicked longbow made from ebony wood, with a set of notches along the grip.

name: Toma's Signet Ring
description: A dark metal ring engraved with the face of a snarling rat. It feels greasy to the touch.

name: Wolfclaws
description: Torn from the paws of a wolf.

name: Mask of the Drowned
description: Putrid skin and bones, long since fused with the remnants of a mask and solidified by the sea over time.

name: Mantle of the Sharkmother
description: A reefhide, brine-soaked scale mantle, marking Braggla's bond with her brood of razor-finned spawn.

name: Ring of the Razobrood
description: A sleek ring, etched with the sigil of Braggla's bonded swarm. It grants its wearer the instincts of a deep-sea hunter.

name: Mawchant Rite Vest
description: Blood-soaked vestments tuned to the Great One's feeding rhythm.

name: Echoless Leggings
description: Delicate leggings that, like their owner, carry not sound, but intent.

name: Whisperless Veil
description: The veil worn during Nirra's final silence rite.

name: Tidecaller's Rituals
description: A ritual tome describing tides, a great beast, and sacrifice.

name: Faceguard of the Torturer
description: A haunting faceguard that hides the wearer's emotions.

name: Vesska's Thorn
description: A jagged earring that was driven through Vesska's flesh during the rite of drowning.

name: Bracer of the Redmark Pact
description: A bracer that seems to hold significance among the bandits of Scarwood.

name: Redmark Spaulders
description: Plated pauldrons bearing the red mark of the Grinholdt bandit clan.

name: Thistlefire Lantern
description: A wooden lantern that burns with a special flame, scented of herbs and fur.

name: Pocket Knife
description: An inventive and highly practical tool that could have many uses.

name: Giant's Loincloth
description: A yellow piece of cloth, worn by a giant. It has a persistant smell to it...

name: Wildbinder's Spear
description: A mark of authority for one who commands once-untamed beasts.

name: Ghostlimb Staff
description: A spectral bark staff that channels the rhythm of the forest's death.

name: Voice of the Land Sabatons
description: Massive sabatons that vibrate softly with the pulse of deep stone. Each step attunes the wearer to distant tremors, buried movement, and the quiet warnings of the land.

name: Drakeling Cuffs
description: Linked bands of emerald drake scales, each plate overlapping with a subtle warmth.

name: Emeraldscale Talonboots
description: Boots capped with polished drake claws. Light and quick, they spark with Kyros's restless cunning.

name: Dawnglow Gossamer Vest
description: A shimmering vest woven from enchanted gossamer. It glows faintly at dawn, filling the wearer with gentle wisdom.

name: Gloves of the Rotting Hound
description: Chain-reinforced wraps stained by Rotmuzzle's frenzy. They heighten instinct, sharpening reactions to sudden threats.

name: Wanderer's Leggings
description: Pilfered chain leggings taken as a trophy by the Fellstone scouts. They bare the hallmarks of human design; a victim that must have strayed too far from the road.

name: Krindor's Wristguard
description: A defiled orcish bracer meant to guard the wrist from a twisted bowstring.

name: Black Widow Sickle
description: A sickle hewn from the glossy, jointed leg of a giant black widow, its ebony chitin ringed with spidery barbs and faint, bleeding runes.

name: Mana Bloodstone
description: A dark crimson bloodstone whose glow pulses slowly and rhythmically like a living heart.

name: The Wrekronomicon
description: A massive iron-bound tome stained with soot and blood, faithfully serving orcish necromancers as both a grimoire and club.

name: Diseased Wolf Mantle
description: A grotesque mantle made from the hide of a diseased wolf.

name: Leafcaller Earring
description: A delicate woodland earring gifted by a dryad ranger, granted to those whose call was answered by the forest.

name: Encrusted Heartleaf Spangenhelm
description: An encrusted Heartleaf Spangenhelm whose once-graceful elven bands are now dulled and dented. May it guard your life better than its previous wearer.

name: Girdle of the Dunecaller
description: A plated girdle bearing the wear of long battles on blackened dunes.

name: Mantle of the Windcaller
description: Sound seems to carry further when you wear it.

name: Brazier Visor
description: A plate visor blackened by years over the spitfire.

name: Butcher's Shoulder Cloth
description: Rough cloth used to clean butcher knives.

name: Boulderbreaker Axe
description: A massive axe with a stone-worn bit.

name: Oiled Tracker Shoulders
description: Oiled shoulders favored by trackers, their slick hide aiding swift pursuit.

name: Templar Iron Fists
description: Iron fists worn by Skullbender, their weight steadying the hands of those who channel holy might.

name: Temple-Forged Aegis
description: A temple-forged aegis carried by Skullbender, its tempered frame unwavering in battle.

name: Debtcarver
description: A sharp blade reforged in cold vengeance.

name: Leggings of Reckoning
description: Sturdy leggings scarred by time and neglect, yet strengthened by the weight of reckoning.

name: Vest of Shattered Duty
description: A reinforced hide vest once worn on watch. Its seams bear the weight of a duty neglected.

name: Darkened Chain Shawl
description: A chain shawl with links stained black to dull their reflection.

name: Nighthorn's Shadowmantle
description: Stolen pauldrons lined with darkened leather. Mirella etched quiet warding marks inside, granting a whisper of her street-honed intuition.

name: Runed Spellward Shield
description: A shield etched with runes by Mirella Nighthorn, forming a quiet barrier against hostile magic.

name: Boots of Vengeful Resolve
description: Unnaturally firm boots that are cold to the touch. Whatever fear once weakened them has been burned away by vengeance.

name: Wilna's Ring
description: A simple silver ring.

name: High Keeper's Vambrace
description: The forest remembers those who protect it.

name: Cloak of the Last Stand
description: A heavy cloak worn by one who refused to yield, even when outnumbered.

name: Darkened Iron Greaves
description: Iron greaves darkened by long use in battle and salty air.

name: Wartide Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets that seem to echo the sounds of war along sandy shores.

name: Den Dweller's Boots
description: Sturdy boots stitched from thick cave hide.

name: Mantle of the Untamed Beast
description: A mantle stripped from a creature that never knew fear or restraint.

name: Redpaw Battle Drum
description: A battle drum fashioned from the hide of the infamous Redpaw. Its every beat induces unease, as if recalling the terrifying struggle it took to claim it.

name: Sangrel Ring of the Arcanist
description: A simple ring worn by initiates of the Sangrel Fist.

name: Sangrel Ring of the Entangler
description: A simple ring worn by initiates of the Sangrel Fist.

name: Sangrel Ring of the Shadowblade
description: A simple ring worn by initiates of the Sangrel Fist.

name: Sangrel Ring of the Striker
description: A simple ring worn by initiates of the Sangrel Fist.

name: Blackwood Plating
description: A rugged plate chestpiece once worn by a loyal advocate of the Sangrel cause.

name: Bloodstained Cloak
description: A well-made cloak stained with blood.

name: Darla's Heirloom Pendant
description: A hefty emerald pendant hanging from a silver chain. It bears an inscription that reads: D.B.

name: Cinch of the Forest Howler
description: A simple leather cinch that seems to hold a soft, fading howl within its seams.

name: Fur-Lined Gloves
description: A supple pair of leather gloves lined with Timberfang's silvery fur. A faint lupine energy clings to them.

name: Ring of the Pauper
description: A simple band of polished palmwood, smoothed by loving hands and given with a promise: "My darling, no distance, not even one as vast as the Twilight Sea, can keep us apart for long, nor stop the love between us."

name: Bight-Coil Shoulderguards
description: Smooth leather plates shaped like coiled serpents. They heighten the wearer's alertness with a serpent's cold, calculating focus.

name: Frightweaver Robe
description: A robe woven from Frightweaver's silk that clings with an eerie lightness. Its threads shimmer like trembling webs, and a chill of dread whispers from every fold.

name: Frightwoven Cape
description: A cape stitched from Frightweaver's silk. Its dark fibers ripple like a living web, trailing a cold, creeping unease that seems to skitter just at the edge of sight.

name: Sphalerite Spider Figurine
effect: Summon Sphalerite Spider (On Click. Any Slot. Cast Time: 10s. Level: 1. Charges: 1/1)
description: A delicate spider sculpted from golden sphalerite and veined in crimson, its facets catching the light in sharp flashes like a warning.

name: Bracer of the Fallen Foe
description: A remarkably clean bracer, aside from the bloodstain.

name: Broken Bone Earring
description: An earring made from a piece of crudely carved bone. The tip is dipped in red paint.

name: Vindicator Breastplate
effect: Lesser Spellshield (On Click. Must Equip. Cast Time: 4s. Level: 40)
description: A mithril-bronze breastplate forged by the hidden masters of the Ninth Rune. The interior is lined with cobalt tracery infused with potent defensive runes, perfect for protecting the hearts of Darra Nor's defenders.

name: Vindicator Greaves
description: Cobalt-etched mithril-bronze greaves crafted with a highly guarded technique of the Ninth Rune. They are built to stand as steadfast as the proud defenders of Darra Nor.

name: Bangled Bracer of Importance
description: Wearing this bracer makes you feel slightly more important.

name: Boots of Certainty
description: A pair of clunky metal boots of undefinable origin.

name: Very Powerful Hammer
description: An ordinary bronze hammer with shiny bangles attached to the handle.

name: Cinder Beetle Serrated Mandible
description: The mandible of a cinder beetle sentinel.

name: Dented Platinum Coin Pendant
description: A leather thong holding a single platinum coin. The coin is concave with a dent that was seemingly made by an arrow.

name: Cinder Beetle Horn
description: The horn of a cinder beetle herald. It is long and hollow with holes along its length, perfect for making music.

name: Favor of the Queen
effect: Cinder Queen's Favor (On Click. Any Slot. Cast Time: 10s. Level: 25)

name: Riverwatch Mantle
description: Pauldrons cooled by a perpetual mist. They steady the spirit with Aquarris's patient, flowing vigilance.

name: Vexfang Hood
description: A crested helm worn by Rhakar's warriors. Its inner carvings channel disciplined focus and battlefield clarity.

name: Sneed's Ambush Treads
description: Light leather boots fitted with silent step soles. Tolman used them for sudden strikes from cover, improving balance, footwork, and the instinct to move before an enemy reacts.

name: Sneed's Cunning Gauntlets
description: Tolman's gauntlets use clever joint plates that allow swift, precise gestures. Arcane markings along the knuckles sharpen tactical thinking and quick spell execution.

name: Bloodied Sickle
description: A sickle stained with dried blood. It bears the inscription: Property of Khalid al-Bahri.

name: Grudgeheft
description: A titanic maul embodying agony transfigured into wrath, the source of a lifetime of suffering. Forged from the malformed shoulder bone of Edric "the Lame" Torvald.
